assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 extracts the Upstream Affected Component (webpack) from customfield_10632 and uses it to search for related CVE Jiras (§1.59)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md Section 1: 'Extracted from TC-8011's customfield_10632: webpack'. Section 2 JQL query: 'cf[10632] ~ "webpack"' used to search for related CVE Jiras, returning TC-8012.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 filters search results by matching PS Component (customfield_10669 = pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui) and Stream (customfield_10832 = rhtpa-2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md Section 3 'Filter by PS Component and Stream': 'TC-8012 PS Component (customfield_10669): pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui -- MATCHES current issue' and 'TC-8012 Stream (customfield_10832): rhtpa-2.2 -- MATCHES current issue'. Both fields are explicitly checked and confirmed matching.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 traverses issuelinks on TC-8012 to find remediation task TC-8013 via the 'Depend' link type
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md Section 4 'Traverse Issue Links on TC-8012': 'Inspecting TC-8012's issuelinks array for linked remediation Tasks with link type "Depend"' and 'Link found: Depend -> TC-8013 (remediation Task)' with summary 'Bump webpack to 5.96.1 in rhtpa-ui [rhtpa-2.2]'.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 compares the remediation task's bump version (5.96.1) against the current CVE's fix threshold (5.98.0) and determines the fix does NOT cover this CVE
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md Section 5 'Compare Remediation Coverage': 'Current CVE fix threshold: 5.98.0', 'Existing remediation bump version: 5.96.1', 'Comparison: 5.96.1 < 5.98.0', 'Verdict: NOT COVERED -- the existing remediation does NOT meet this CVE's fix threshold'.

assertion_results.text: The overlap table is presented to the engineer showing TC-8012 and TC-8013 with 'Covers This CVE? = No' — the triage proceeds to create new remediation tasks rather than recommending closure
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md Section 6 table shows 'CVE-2026-43210 | TC-8012 | TC-8013 | 5.96.1 | No (threshold: 5.98.0)' and states 'No existing remediation covers this CVE's fix threshold. Proceeding with new remediation task creation.' triage-outcome.md confirms: 'Decision: Proceed with new remediation task creation (Case A -- Affected)' with two new tasks described (upstream backport and downstream propagation).
